# full-config

Dex with multi-connector, staticClients, and top-level Extra fields from SSO docs

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/dex/full-config` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  dex.config: |
    issuer: https://argocd.example.com/api/dex
    storage:
      type: memory
    connectors:
      - type: github
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        config:
          clientID: $dex.github.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
          orgs:
            - name: example-org
              teams:
                - platform
      - type: oidc
        id: google
        name: Google
        config:
          issuer: https://accounts.google.com
          clientID: $dex.google.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.google.clientSecret
          insecureSkipEmailVerified: true
    staticClients:
      - id: argo-workflow
        name: Argo Workflow
        redirectURIs:
          - https://workflows.example.com/oauth2/callback
        secret: $dex.static.argoWorkflow
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    dex:
      connectors:
      - config:
          clientID: $dex.github.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
          orgs:
          - name: example-org
            teams:
            - platform
        id: github
        name: GitHub
        type: github
      - config:
          clientID: $dex.google.clientId
          clientSecret: $dex.google.clientSecret
          insecureSkipEmailVerified: true
          issuer: https://accounts.google.com
        id: google
        name: Google
        type: oidc
      extra:
        issuer: https://argocd.example.com/api/dex
        storage:
          type: memory
      staticClients:
      - id: argo-workflow
        name: Argo Workflow
        redirectURIs:
        - https://workflows.example.com/oauth2/callback
        secret: $dex.static.argoWorkflow
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  dex.config: |
    connectors:
    - config:
        clientID: $dex.github.clientId
        clientSecret: $dex.github.clientSecret
        orgs:
        - name: example-org
          teams:
          - platform
      id: github
      name: GitHub
      type: github
    - config:
        clientID: $dex.google.clientId
        clientSecret: $dex.google.clientSecret
        insecureSkipEmailVerified: true
        issuer: https://accounts.google.com
      id: google
      name: Google
      type: oidc
    issuer: https://argocd.example.com/api/dex
    staticClients:
    - id: argo-workflow
      name: Argo Workflow
      redirectURIs:
      - https://workflows.example.com/oauth2/callback
      secret: $dex.static.argoWorkflow
    storage:
      type: memory
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
